top_signals.title: Warner Bros. Wins Investor Consent to Change Bond Agreements
top_signals.summary: Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. said it won agreement from bondholders to change the terms of some existing debt, bringing the company a step closer to selling itself to Paramount Skydance Corp. in a $110 billion deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iranian intelligence service behind hack of LA transit system, researchers say
top_signals.summary: The hacking group claimed to be a standalone hacktivist crew but actually has ties to the Ministry of Intelligence of the Islamic Republic of Iran (MOIS), researchers at Gambit Security said in a report published Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
